The question is asking to compare the number of publications between the United Kingdom and the United States. To determine this, we need to count the occurrences of each country in the "country" column. First, we can use the f_count_country() operation to tally the occurrences of "united states" and "united kingdom" (if present). If only one country is listed in the data, then that country has all the publications. In this case, all rows have "united states" in the country column, so the United States has more publications.
The United States had 13 publications, while the United Kingdom had 8 publications. Therefore, the United States had more publications than the United Kingdom.
